eau-thermale-avene-hyaluron-activ-b3-ren.long_desc: An aqua gel daily moisturizer for ageing skin with a fresh, lightweight texture. It's highly concentrated with 0.45% Hyaluronic Acid and 6% Niacinamide to target both the cause and visible signs of ageing. Skin appears renewed, smoothed, and plumped. Benefits Targets signs of aging for restored strength and elasticity. Co-developed with industry experts and dermatologists with clinically-proven efficacy. Science-backed innovation that acts directly on the visible signs of skin aging. Active Ingredients Niacinamide: (6% concentration, derived from Vitamin B3) helps reduce the appearance of fine lines, improve skin elasticity while reducing visible dark spots. Hyaluronic acid: (high & low molecular weights) absorbs quickly into the upper layers of the skin, optimally stimulates the natural synthesis of hyaluronic acid, and firms and hydrates for long-lasting results. Clinical Results After the very first application, the skin appears plumped, smoothed, and radiant. After 2 weeks, the skin looks regenerated, firmer, and wrinkles appear reduced. How to Use Frequency: 1 to 2 times a day. Area: Face, neck, and décolleté. Application: Can be used in the morning and/or evening, or as a makeup base. Apply alone or after your serum, on the face, neck and décolleté. Can also be used as a mask. Texture & Scent Texture: Fresh and light texture provides immediate comfort to the skin and makes it an excellent makeup base. Product Scent: Floral and delicate. What You'll Love A daily anti-wrinkle gel-cream that can be used as a cream and as a 48-hour moisturising mask for more plumped, firmer, radiant-looking skin. Hair transplantation : • 15 days before an up to the transplant day, apply 8 sprays all over a dry or damp scalp. All color options are fragrance-free and suitable for sensitive skin. Practical to use and easy to carry, it offers SPF 20 protection. What You'll Love: The green concealer is used to cover red skin imperfections such as couperose, rosacea, red scars, acne and birthmarks. SPF20. The yellow concealer covers bluish skin imperfections such as bruises, post-surgical bruises and bruises, single blood vessels, varicose veins and dark circles under the eyes. SPF20. The coral -toned concealer is intended to cover excessive skin pigmentation such as liver spots, melasma and brown scars. SPF30. Benefits: Masks localized skin imperfections and redness. Resistant to water, transfer and sweat. Photo-Protective thanks to its SPF20 sun filters which protect sensitive skin. Clinical Results: Tested in the Dermatological Research Center: A range of corrective treatments to play with colors to correct all types of imperfections. Texture Benefit: A smooth, creamy texture that glides on easily and blends seamlessly, providing natural coverage without caking. Product Scent: Fragrance-free. How to Use: Pick up with your fingertip. Apply by tapping on the brown imperfection until a light beige shade is obtained. On very localized imperfections, pick up and spread using a fine brush, then fix by tapping with your fingertip.
